creator: kent@erix.ericsson.se
text:
The "/usr/ports/textproc/se-ispell" port should be removed. There is
support for the Swedish dictionary in the ordinary ispell port using

  % cd /usr/ports/textproc/ispell
  % make ISPELL_SE=yes
  % make install

This port will install the Swedish ispell dictionary in 
"/usr/local/share/ispell".

Now, if I only could find out how to unsubmit a port...
 
kent
